channel.title: Self-Service on David Gomez - Technology & Business Insights
channel.description: Recent content in Self-Service on David Gomez - Technology & Business Insights

item.title: Case Study: The $48K Question They Answered Themselves
item.description:
Real numbers from a real company that decided to stop waiting on senior engineers for infrastructure answers.

The Company: 15-Person SaaS Startup

Team Size: 15 people (3 engineers)
Monthly AWS Spend: $8,400
The Problem: The non-technical founder had questions. The engineers were always busy.

The Situation

Sarah (founder, non-technical) ran the business. She had questions about their AWS setup:

  • “Are we overpaying for hosting?”
  • “Is our data secure?”
  • “What happens if AWS goes down in one region?”
  • “Can we handle 10x traffic growth?”

But asking meant interrupting her engineering team, who were heads-down building features for the next release.

item.title: Stop Asking 'Are We Overpaying?' - Get the Answer Instantly
item.description:
Stop waiting hours for a busy engineer to answer a simple AWS question. With the right tool, you can audit your own infrastructure and get accurate, documentation-backed answers instantly.

Stop Guessing About Your AWS Bill

How many times have you looked at your AWS bill and wondered: ‘Are we overpaying?’ But then you don’t ask because:

  • Engineering is busy with ‘real’ work

  • You’re not sure if it’s a dumb question
